items.title: US wants Iran to pledge to stop shooting at ships in Strait of Hormuz
items.dek: Vice-President JD Vance is among US officials expected to take part in negotiations resuming on Saturday in Oman.

items.title: How a fake presidential council ended up with a budget of almost $1m in Nigeria
items.dek: The government says it was set up with a forged letter of appointment but others say there is more to it.
items.body: The government says it was set up with a forged letter of appointment but others say there is more to it.
